items.name: ai-rules
items.description: ai-rules is a governance framework designed to solve "Architectural Decay" in AI-driven development. It forces AI Agents (Cursor, Windsurf, Copilot) to respect your project's boundaries, UI libraries, and design patterns.

items.name: agentic_coding_flywheel_setup
items.description: Bootstraps a fresh Ubuntu VPS into a complete multi-agent AI development environment in 30 minutes: coding agents, session management, safety tools, and coordination infrastructure

items.name: routa
items.description: Build Your Agent Team for Real-World AI Development - Workspace-first multi-agent coordination platform for AI development, with shared Specs, Kanban orchestration, and MCP/ACP/   A2A support across web and desktop.

items.name: lobehub
items.description: The ultimate space for work and life — to find, build, and collaborate with agent teammates that grow with you. We are taking agent harness to the next level — enabling multi-agent collaboration, effortless agent team design, and introducing agents as the unit of work interaction.

items.name: lobu
items.description: Add autonomous agents to your product. Multi-tenant OpenClaw 🦞
